chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

text: 803 - وَقَالَ إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ أَبِي مَحْمُودٍ لِلرِّضَا عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: اَلرَّجُلُ يُصَلِّي عَلَى سَرِيرٍ مِنْ سَاجٍ وَ يَسْجُدُ عَلَى اَلسَّاجِ قَالَ «نَعَمْ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.803 - Ibrahim ibn Abi Mahmoud said to Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha (as) about a man who prays on a bed made of teakwood and prostrates on the teakwood itself.
Imam (as) replied: "Yes, there is no issue”.
